Adept of Possession.name: Adept of Possession
Adept of Possession.equipped_with: An Adept of Possession is equipped with: Frag grenades; Krak grenades.

option_groups.header: May receive a Mark of Chaos
One Adept of Possession per army can be upgraded to a Master of Possession for +15 points.
Has access to weapons and gear from the Armory.
May have up to 2 veteran abilities.

abilities: Daemon, <Legion>

Daemonic corruption: Roll 2D6 at the start of the activation if this model is accompanied by a unit and set up on the battlefield (being in a transporter does not count towards being on the battlefield for that purpose). Apply following results to that unit permanently:
1=+2" Movement
2=+1 Strength
3=+1 Toughness
4=+1 Initiative
5=+1 Wound
6=+1 Attack
If a result is applied for the third time, the unit is destroyed. Place a chaos spawn for every fourth wound (rounded down) within 3" of the model with this ability.
Master of Possession: You may roll 1D6 or 2D6 on the "Daemonic corruption" table.

Chaos Lieutenant.name: Chaos Lieutenant
Chaos Lieutenant.equipped_with: A Chaos Lieutenant is equipped with: Frag grenades; Krak grenades.

option_groups.header: May receive a Mark of Chaos
One Chaos Lieutenant per army can be upgraded to a Chaos Lord for +15 points.
Has access to weapons and gear from the Armory.
May have up to 2 veteran abilities.

abilities: Veterans of the Long War: The Chaos Lieutenant can assign a free Veteran ability to himself and a friendly unit at the start of the deployment. Both units must be able to gain the veteran ability and it must be the same ability. It does not count against the limit on how many veteran abilities a unit can have.
Chaos Lord: A Chaos Lord may use Veterans of the Long War a second time.

Chaos Sorcerer.name: Chaos Sorcerer
Chaos Sorcerer.equipped_with: A Chaos Sorcerer is equipped with: Frag grenades; Krak grenades.

option_groups.header: May receive a Mark of Chaos
One Chaos Sorcerer per army can be upgraded to a Master of Sorcery for +15 points.
Has access to weapons and gear from the Armory.
May have up to 2 veteran abilities.

abilities: Master of Sorcery: The model can cast and deny 1 additional power per battle round.
Psyker: The model can cast 1 power and deny 1 power per battle round. It knows Smite and all powers from a chosen discipline.

Dark Apostle.name: Dark Apostle
Dark Apostle.equipped_with: A Dark Apostle is equipped with: Crozius Maleficum; Frag grenades; Krak grenades.

option_groups.header: May receive a Mark of Chaos
One Dark Apostle per army can be upgraded to a Sinister Bishop for +20 points.
Has access to weapons and gear from the Armory.
May have up to 2 veteran abilities.

abilities: Faithful: A Dark Apostle may pray once per turn. A prayer is successful at a roll of 3+. A Dark Apostle knows all prayers to the dark gods.
Seal of corruption: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.
Sinister Bishop: A Sinister Bishop may pray one additional time per battle round.

Daemon Prince.name: Daemon Prince
Daemon Prince.equipped_with: A Daemon prince is equipped with: Malefic talons.

option_groups.header: May receive a Mark of Chaos
Can get one of the following weapons
Can get the following weapon
If no Mark of Khorne is taken, can be upgraded to a psyker for +5 points.
Can be equipped with wings for +37 points to gain +6" M and the "Jump pack infantry" Unit type.
May have up to 2 veteran abilities.
Has access to weapons and gear from the Armory like a character model.

abilities: Deep strike, Daemon, Daemonic instability, Terrifying(-1)
Psyker: The model can cast 1 power and deny 1 power per battle round. He knows Smite and 1 power from a chosen discipline.

Infernal Acolyte.name: Infernal Acolyte
Infernal Acolyte.equipped_with: An Infernal Acolyte is a single model equipped with: Frag grenades; Krak grenades.

option_groups.header: May receive a Mark of Chaos
One Infernal Acolyte per army can be upgraded to an Infernal Master for +15 points.
May have up to 1 veteran ability.
Has access to weapons and gear from the Armory.

abilities: Infernal Pact: An Infernal Acolyte may attempt to make one pact per activation. A pact is successful on a 3+. An Infernal Acolyte knows all Infernal Pacts.
Infernal Master: An Infernal Master may attempt to make one additional pact each activation.

Lord Discordant.name: Lord Discordant
Lord Discordant.equipped_with: A Lord Discordant is equipped with: Baleflamer; Bladed limbs; Impaler chainglaive; Frag grenades; Krak grenades.

profiles.name: Charge
profiles.abilities: AT(2), Can only be used with a Charge order

option_groups.header: May receive a Mark of Chaos
May replace its Baleflamer
May be equipped with one of the following
Has access to weapons and gear from the Armory.
May have up to 2 veteran abilities.

abilities: Move through cover
Technovirus-Injector: Melee attacks gain the "Tank hunter" ability.

Warpsmith.name: Warpsmith
Warpsmith.equipped_with: A Warpsmith is equipped with: Flamer tendril; Meltagun tendril; Omnissiah power axe; Frag grenades; Krak grenades.

option_groups.header: May receive a Mark of Chaos
One Warpsmith per army can be upgraded to a Daemonforge Mastersmith for +15 points.
Has access to weapons and gear from the Armory.
May have up to 2 veteran abilities.

abilities: Blessing of the Omnissiah: At the end of its move, the model may attempt to repair a vehicle within 6". On a 4+, one "Weapon destroyed" or "Engine damage" result is removed from the vehicle, or 1 hull point is restored. Alternatively, a vehicle within 6" can reroll a hit roll and a wound or armor penetration roll.
Daemonforge Mastersmith: A Daemonforge Mastersmith may use the "Blessing of the Omnissiah" twice.

Accursed Cultists.name: Accursed Cultists
Accursed Cultists.equipped_with: Every Accursed Cultist is equipped with: Vile mutation. Every Torment is equipped with: Daemonic mutation.

option_groups.header: All models may receive a mark of chaos (points per model)
Per 5 Accursed Cultist models you may set up 1 Torment.

abilities: Unpredictable mutations: Models with this ability cannot use transport vehicles. At the start of each activation, this unit may return 1D3 dead models to the game.

Chaos Space Marines.name: Chaos Space Marines
Chaos Space Marines.equipped_with: Every model is equipped with: Astartes Chainsword; Bolter; Bolt pistol; Frag grenades; Krak grenades.
footnotes: * Choose one of the following profiles

option_groups.header: All models may receive a Mark of Chaos (points per model)
For each 5 models, one Chaos Space Marine may swap their Bolter
For each 5 models, one other Chaos Space Marine may swap their Astartes Chainsword, Bolter and Bolt pistol
The Chaos Space Marine Champion may be upgraded to an Aspiring Chaos Space Marine Champion for +10pts and gains access to weapons and gear from the Armory.
May have up to 2 veteran abilities.

Cultists.name: Cultists
Cultists.equipped_with: Every model is equipped with: Machine gun; Frag grenades.
footnotes: * Choose one of the following profiles

option_groups.header: All models may receive a mark of chaos (points per model)
Any model can swap their Machine gun
For every 10 models, one Cultist may swap their Machine gun
A Champion may be upgraded to an Aspiring Cultist Champion for +5 points. The Aspiring Cultist Champion has access to weapons and gear from the Armory.

Jakhals.name: Jakhals
Jakhals.equipped_with: Every Jakhal and Jakhal Pack Leader is equipped with: Autopistol; Chainblades. Every Dishonored is equipped with: Chainblades.

option_groups.header: For every 8 models in the unit, one Jakhal may swap their Chainblade
For every 8 models in the unit, two Dishonored may swap their Chainblades
The Jakhal Pack Leader can be promoted to an Aspiring Jakhal Champion for +5pts and gains access to the armory.

abilities: Berserk(5+), Mark of Khorne

Mutants.name: Mutants
Mutants.equipped_with: Every model is equipped with: Crude melee weapon; Frag grenades.

option_groups.header: The entire unit may receive one of the following upgrades per model
Any model may swap their Crude melee weapon
Up to three models may swap their Crude melee weapon
A Mutant may be upgraded to a Mutant Boss for +5 points. The Mutant Boss has access to weapons and gear from the Armory.

abilities: Upgrades:
Bloated: The model gains a 4+ armor save.
Burly, brawny or goatheaded: The model gains +1 Strength.
Horrifying, hypnotic or brightly coloured: The unit gains the cumulative ability "Terrifying(-1)".
Leaping, floating or winged: The model gains the "Anti-Grav" and "Haste(1")" abilities.

Poxwalkers.name: Poxwalkers
Poxwalkers.equipped_with: Every model is equipped with: Improvised weapons.
abilities: Mark of Nurgle
Mindless: The unit automatically passes every Leadership test. It can contest mission objectives, but never hold them.
Slaves of Darkness: You may not select more Poxwalker units than Plague Marine units.

Traitor Guard.name: Traitor Guard
Traitor Guard.equipped_with: Every Traitor Guardsman is equipped with: Lasgun, Frag grenades. Every Chaos Ogryn is equipped with: Power maul
footnotes: * Choose one of the following profiles

option_groups.header: All models may receive a mark of chaos (points per model)
Each model's Lasgun may be replaced by a Chainsword and a Laspistol.
For each 10 models, one Traitor Guardsman's Lasgun may be replaced by
One Traitor Guardman may be promoted to a Traitor Sergeant for +5pts and gains access to the armory.
For each 10 models you may select 1 Chaos Ogryn.

abilities: Bodyguard (Chaos Ogryn only): Wounds inflicted must first be allocated to the model before other models in the unit can be selected. Attacks with the “Precision” rule take a -1 hit penalty if they affect an attached character.

Tzaangors.name: Tzaangors
Tzaangors.equipped_with: Each model is equipped with: Chainsword, Machine pistol

option_groups.header: One model may be equipped with
Another model may be equipped with

The Twistbray can be promoted to an Aspiring Twistbray for +5pts and gains access to the armory.

abilities: Mark of Tzeentch
Eldritch Shield: The model gains the abilities "Deflect" and "Parry".

abilities: Deep strike, Massive(1), Unyielding

Chosen.name: Chosen
Chosen.equipped_with: A Chosen is equipped with: Krak grenades; Frag grenades.

option_groups.header: For every HQ selection, the army may include one Chosen unit.
All models may receive a Mark of Chaos (points per model)
The entire squad may receive one of the following upgrades per model
All models have access to the armory.
May have up to 2 veteran abilities.

abilities: Command squad
Upgrades:
Accursed Weaponry: The model gains the "Deflagrate(5+)" ability for all melee attacks.
Clad in Midnight: The model gains the "Stealth" ability.
Dark Crusaders: The model and its attached unit gain the "Frenzy(1")" ability and roll 2D6 (pick highest) for the extra movement with an Advance order.
Malicious Ammuniton: The model gains the "Deflagrate(5+)" ability for all ranged attacks.
Monstrous Visages: The model gains the "Parry" ability and additionally the "Gruesome" ability for all melee weapons.
Tip of the Spear: When set up using the Infiltrator rules, the model can always be placed outside 12" of an enemy unit, even if there is direct line of sight.

Cultist Firebrand.equipped_with: A Cultist Firebrand is equipped with: Baleflamer; Frag grenades.

Has access to weapons and gear from the Armory.

option_groups.header: All models may receive a mark of chaos (points per model)

abilities: Faithful: A Cult Demagogue may pray once per turn. A prayer is successful at a roll of 3+. A Cult Demagogue knows all prayers from a chosen list.
Chaos banner: Cultists within 6" use the Ld of the bearer.
Command squad: For every HQ choice you may buy one Dark Commune unit which doesn't take an Elite slot.

Eyes of Mortarion: Attached HQ models gain +1 attack in melee.

All Eightbound and the Eightbound Champion may be upgraded to Exalted Eightbound

abilities: Berserk(5+), Blind Rage, Massive(1), Mark of Khorne
Exalted Eightbound: The model gains +1 Wound and the "Daemon" ability.

Exalted Plague Champion.name: Exalted Plague Champion
Exalted Plague Champion.equipped_with: A Exalted Plague Champion is equipped with: Blight grenades; Krak grenades; Plague knife. A Foul Blightspawn is additionally equipped with: Plague sprayer.

option_groups.header: Must be upgraded to one of the following
Has access to weapons and gear from the Armory.
Can gain a Veteran ability.

abilities: Command squad, Mark of Nurgle
Advisor: For every HQ unit, you may select up to 5 Exalted Plague Champions without using up an Elite slot. Each specialisation can only be selected once per HQ unit.
Upgrades:
Biologus Putrifier:
Blight Racks: The Biologus Putrifier and any attached unit uses the "Enhanced blight grenades" profile for their Blight grenades.
Foul Infiusion: All melee attacks of the Biologus Putrifier and his attached unit gain the "Deadly(5+)" ability.
Putrid Explosion: If the Biologus Putrifier is killed roll a die. On a 4+ he explodes like a vehicle with a 6" radius.
Foul Blightspawn:
Putrefying Stink: All enemy models in the same melee combat with the Foul Blightspawn suffer a -1 penalty to their Initiative.
Noxious Blightbringer:
Bell of Demise: Enemy attempts at Hymns, Invocations, Prayers and Psychic powers within 21" of the model get -1 penalty to succeed.
Plague Surgeon:

Tainted Narthecium: Once per turn, the damage of a wound against the model or attached unit can be reduced by 1. The ability must be declared after armor and saving throws. Does not work against weapons with a Strength of 8 or higher.
Surgeon: The Plague Surgeon and any attached unit of Plague Marines gain the "Warded" ability.
Tallyman:
The Seven-fold Chant: Roll 2D6 each time the Tallyman is activated. On a roll of 7+, any of your own die may be re-rolled later in the game.

Flawless Blades.equipped_with: Each model is equipped with: Blissblade; Bolt pistol.

Dreadclaw Drop Pod.name: Dreadclaw Drop Pod
Dreadclaw Drop Pod.equipped_with: A Dreadclaw Drop Pod is equipped with: Blade struts; Thermal jets.

option_groups.header: May receive a Mark of Chaos
May have up to 2 veteran abilities.
Has access to vehicle equipment from the Armory.

abilities: Anti-Grav, Deep strike

Control Jets: The Drop Pod must land at least 6" away from other units (friendly or enemy) and can never stray closer than 1" to another unit, terrain, or the edge of the field. Reduce the deviation only enough to place the Drop Pod.
Drop Pod Assault: Drop Pods always start the game as reserves and are always set up via Deep strike. Even if the played mission does not allow reinforcements and/or Deep strike!
Transport: This model has a transport capacity of 10 models or 1 Helbrute.

Miasmic Malignifier.name: Miasmic Malignifier
Miasmic Malignifier.equipped_with: A Miasmic Malignifier is equipped with: Noxious stink.
abilities: Infiltrator, Mark of Nurgle
Unmanned: A Miasmic Malignifier can't contest or capture mission objectives.
Pest explosion: If the model is destroyed, it always explodes. The explosion range is 6".

Putrescent Fog: At the start of each activation, the model can create a Putrescent Fog with a "Stand & Shoot" command. To do so, place a Putrescent Fog marker (a 3" radius circle) within 7" of any friendly unit bearing the Mark of Nurgle. All enemy units treat the zone as difficult terrain and must take one Toughness test per model if they touch or move over the circle during their activation. For each failed test, the unit suffers one Mortal Wound.

Noctilith Crown.name: Noctilith Crown
Noctilith Crown.equipped_with: A Noctilith Crown is equipped with: Lashing warp energies.
abilities: Infiltrator

Unholy Conduit: A friendly unit starting its activation within 12" of the Noctilith Crown can attempt to pray to the Dark Gods. Roll 2D6. On a roll of 6+, the unit gains the effect of a prayer from the sheet "Prayers to the Dark Gods". On any roll below 6 it gets hit with the Lashing warp energies profile.
Unmanned: A Noctilith Crown can't contest or capture mission objectives.
Warp explosion: If the model is destroyed, it always explodes. The explosion range is 6".

May replace its Baleflamer
May have up to 2 veteran abilities.

abilities: Anti-Grav, Fast, Hover mode
Vector strike: Each enemy unit which is passed by this model suffers 1D6 automatic hits with the model's melee weapon.
